title: nasturtium ludovicianum
intro: Nasturtium ludovicianum, also known as tall watercress or tall nasturtium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nasturtium ludovicianum include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or added to salads and other dishes for its peppery flavor and potential health benefits.
